subject: Updates for OpenDaylight Potassium release
commit_message:
Updates for OpenDaylight Potassium release

Update parent pom versions to versions for OpenDaylight Potassium

Issue-ID: CCSDK-4043
Change-Id: I78b5712265bf29774f6e9cd26f160ec035ba1c21
Signed-off-by: Dan Timoney <dtimoney@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-oran-review-verification-maven-master/700/ : FAILURE

Unable to build due to a non-resolvable parent POM. Search logs for "[FATAL] Non-resolvable parent POM" to find the logs.

The fix for this is usually to make sure your poms are pointing to parents that exist. Double check:

 * groupId is correct and no typos
 * artifactId is correct and no typos
 * version is correct for branch ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-oran-review-verification-maven-master/700/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/ccsdk-oran-review-verification-maven-master/700
